title: Avery Dennison (AVY) Q4 Earnings Miss Estimates, Down Y/Y

title: Avery Dennison (AVY) Q4 Earnings Lag Estimates
text: Avery Dennison (AVY) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -0.93% and 1.99%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2021. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Avery Dennison Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2021 Results
text: GLENDALE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Avery Dennison Corporation (NYSE:AVY) today announced preliminary, unaudited results for its fourth quarter and full year ended January 1, 2022. Non-GAAP financial measures referenced in this document are reconciled to GAAP in the attached financial schedules. title: Industrial Stocks Earnings Due on Feb 2: EMR, ROP & More
text: Industrial's October-December earnings are likely to reflect the impacts of improved economic activities, cost inflation and supply-chain issues. Releases by EMR, ROP, AVY & HWM are worth a look.
